shortDescription: Canada IRCC · CLB scored · Express Entry & citizenship pathways

policyAlert.summary: Verify CELPIP-General exam fee and dates on the official booking portal before quoting. Coaching fee is separate. Never guarantee a score.

alert.title: CELPIP-General for Canada only
alert.body: CELPIP-General is accepted by IRCC for Canadian immigration and citizenship — not for USA, UK, or Australia study visas. Confirm pathway before enrollment.

about.label: Description
about.value: Structured CELPIP General preparation with trainer-led classes, homework, and progress tracking.

about.label: Ideal for
about.value: Canada PR, citizenship, and pathways accepting CELPIP-General (not Academic).

about.label: Delivery
about.value: Classroom or hybrid per branch schedule. Materials per program policy.

about.label: After course
about.value: Exam guidance, score tracking, retake recommendation, and handoff to admissions/visa team when target met.

eligibility.criterion: Diagnostic or prior score on file

redFlagsBanner: If attendance drops or mocks stay far below target, pause exam booking and reset the study plan.

redFlags.title: Unrealistic target
redFlags.description: Large gap expected in very short timeline.
redFlags.fix: Reset timeline or recommend appropriate program

redFlags.title: Chronic absenteeism
redFlags.fix: Counselor call, batch change, or pause

faqs.q: CELPIP vs IELTS for Canada PR?
faqs.a: Both accepted by IRCC when taken in the correct format (CELPIP-General; IELTS GT or Academic per program). Choose based on student strength and seat availability.
IRCC immigration uses CELPIP-General. Academic is for select professional designations — not standard Express Entry.

faqs.q: How does CELPIP map to CLB?
faqs.a: CELPIP levels map directly to CLB (e.g. CELPIP 7 = CLB 7 in each skill).

faqs.q: Who pays the CELPIP exam fee?
faqs.a: Student pays Paragon/celpip.ca directly. FLC coaching fee is separate.
No. Targets come from diagnostics and mocks — never guarantee scores.

faqs.q: Is TOEFL accepted for Canada PR?
faqs.a: No. IRCC accepts IELTS and CELPIP-General (and CELPIP per program rules) — not TOEFL.
Two years from test date for most IRCC purposes.
At Paragon test centers — verify celpip.ca for India/Canada availability.

compliance: Never guarantee exam scores or bands
Separate coaching fee from exam registration fee
Signed enrollment agreement before batch start
Record diagnostic and mock scores on client file
proTips: Map every Canada lead to CLB before quoting timeline
Use CELPIP-General only — not Academic for standard PR
Track mocks per skill — CELPIP scores each skill separately
Link results to Express Entry file as soon as scores arrive
postApproval: Collect official score report when released
Update client record for admissions / visa team
Plan retake or booster if below target

timeline.title: Exam booking, test day prep, score follow-up

staffNotes.author: Coaching team
staffNotes.text: Use this specimen for counselor training on CELPIP General.

dos: Keep exam fee separate on quotes
mistakes: Visa team not updated when target met

quiz.question: Counselors must never for CELPIP General:
quiz.explanation: Score guarantees are prohibited for all coaching programs.

quiz.question: CELPIP General coaching fee and official exam fee should be:
quiz.explanation: Coaching and exam fees must be quoted separately.

quiz.question: Before enrollment in CELPIP General, FLC recommends:
quiz.explanation: Diagnostic and target alignment are required before batch start.

quiz.question: Minimum attendance standard for CELPIP General is typically:
quiz.explanation: Review attendance when it drops below 80%.

quiz.question: CELPIP-General is primarily used for:
quiz.explanation: CELPIP-General is accepted by IRCC for Canadian immigration.

quiz.question: Enrollment agreement for CELPIP General should be signed:
quiz.explanation: Signed agreement before classes begin.

quiz.question: Before advising official exam booking for CELPIP General:
quiz.explanation: Readiness should be based on mock performance.

quiz.question: When attendance drops below 80% in CELPIP General:
quiz.explanation: Attendance issues require counselor follow-up.

quiz.question: Official score report for CELPIP General should be:
options: Logged on client file and shared with visa/admissions team
quiz.explanation: Score reports must be documented and handed off when relevant.

quiz.question: CELPIP level 7 equals approximately:
quiz.explanation: CELPIP scores map 1:1 to CLB levels.

quiz.question: For Canada Express Entry FSW, CLB 7 typically requires:
quiz.explanation: CLB 7 = CELPIP 7 in each skill.

quiz.question: TOEFL iBT is accepted by IRCC for Canadian PR:
quiz.explanation: IRCC does not accept TOEFL for immigration.

quiz.question: CELPIP score validity for immigration is generally:
quiz.explanation: Two years from test date for most IRCC uses.

quiz.question: A student with unrealistic target timeline for CELPIP General should:
quiz.explanation: Unrealistic timelines must be corrected before enrollment.

quiz.question: Sales promising a guaranteed band/score for CELPIP General is:
quiz.explanation: Never guarantee exam outcomes.

quiz.question: Retake planning for CELPIP General should be based on:
quiz.explanation: Retakes need structured gap analysis.

quiz.question: Visa/admissions team handoff for CELPIP General happens when:
options: Target met and official report available
quiz.explanation: Hand off when target is met and documentation is on file.

quiz.question: CELPIP Academic is suitable for most IRCC PR applications:
options: No — IRCC accepts CELPIP-General for most PR
quiz.explanation: IRCC immigration generally requires CELPIP-General, not Academic.

quiz.question: CELPIP is administered by:
quiz.explanation: Paragon Testing Enterprises administers CELPIP in Canada.

quiz.question: A student needing USA F-1 admission should typically consider:
options: TOEFL or IELTS Academic per university
CELPIP Academic for all US unis
quiz.explanation: US admissions rarely use CELPIP — confirm university list.
